creator: freebsd@gregv.net
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #13)

OK, there may be one other issue.  In doing some functional testing of the new build on a fresh 11.1-RELEASE install, running throws some X11 errors and some UI elements don't render correctly.  Everything looks good on my main desktop system however (also 11.1-RELEASE).  So I think there may be some missing run depends in the new version.  I'll try to get those figured out today or tomorrow.  If I do, I'll upload a new patch with those added, the USES=compiler option, and the updated patch-Makefile.in (since nobody has objected to that) to strip the binaries.
